meaning: n.种植者,耕作者,种植园主,殖民者
examples: Besides, a small planter box in a sunny part at home can encourage children to understand more about where their food comes from.
A Wearable Planter Why should your plants stay at home?
One Pot, Two Lives a planter and a fish tank joined together.
If she's entertaining outside, Ms. Arntsen likes to stick incense into a potted planter.
Lewis and Planter had an on-again, off-again relationship at the time of the killing, the prosecutor said.
